content: Most SMBs don’t need new software—they need one broken workflow fixed. We map your bottleneck in 15 minutes.
If one employee being out breaks your process, you don’t have a staffing issue—you have a workflow issue.
Square/Stripe/Clover are great at payments. We automate everything around them.
Quick test: How many times did your team copy/paste between tools today?
Case-study offer: We fix ONE workflow in 7 days. No rip-and-replace.
Ops Time-Leak Scorecard: 8 yes/no checks to find hidden admin drain.
Manual end-of-day reporting is a tax on growth. Automate the closeout.
